title: Sky Lands
description: Adds new sky islands biomes, blocks, bosses, weaponery and much more
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6300dfa243e6bb89fb6b7822b0d62aea7237ae5f.png)

This mod adds 4 new biomes full of sky islands mostly inspired by tears of the kingdom and lots of sky dungeons with new mobs, new bosses and new loot.

There are also new movement options : slow fall, sky dive and the glider.

**-THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB, PLAYERANIMATOR, CLOTH CONFIG API AND TERRABLENDER-**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-T3tpdBPLFQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod it's still in alpha and i'm working on adding more content,

the mod's original soundtrack: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4xECfimnqpc&list=PLGOPNxORVKozDgSJeP2-A8wETw_uK1mPS
